raw:
{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent output engages the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.4": "The agent output maps against the nearest works, identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta, and articulates the delta clearly.",
    "R1.7": "The agent output audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and demonstrates a thorough understanding of the relevant literature.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, demonstrating a clear understanding of uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "The agent output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), demonstrating scope adherence.",
    "RX.4": "The agent output identifies harmful patterns in the original text and avoids introducing new errors or fabrications.",
    "RX.5": "The agent output annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, demonstrating provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.95,
    "R1.7": 0.98,
    "RX.1": 0.92,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.96,
    "RX.5": 0.97
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent output engages the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.4: The agent output maps against the nearest works, identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta, and articulates the delta clearly.
rationale.R1.7: The agent output audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and demonstrates a thorough understanding of the relevant literature.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, demonstrating a clear understanding of uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The agent output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), demonstrating scope adherence.
rationale.RX.4: The agent output identifies harmful patterns in the original text and avoids introducing new errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.5: The agent output annotates every non-cosmetic change with source and reason, demonstrating provenance and traceability.
